title: Chhichhore
tmdbOverview: Following a group of friends from university as they progress into middle-age life and go their own separate ways.
synopsis: Released in 2019, Chhichhore is a romance, comedy and drama film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 12 certification (IE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
